name: Koukoutu ComfyUI Nodes
description: ComfyUI nodes for Koukoutu API integration including background removal
author: Koukoutu

KoukoutuBackgroundRemoval.description: Remove background from images using Koukoutu API

KoukoutuStampCrop.description: Locate and crop stamps/patterns from images using Koukoutu async API

KoukoutuImageToImage.description: Generate new images from an input image using prompts via Koukoutu async API

KoukoutuImageExtract.description: Extract stamps/patterns from images using Koukoutu async API

KoukoutuImageExtractV2.description: Mid-level stamp/pattern extraction from images using Koukoutu async API (v2 model)

KoukoutuWatermarkRemoval.description: Automatically remove watermarks from images using Koukoutu async API

KoukoutuAIShadow.description: Generate AI shadow effects for transparent PNG images using Koukoutu async API

KoukoutuUpscale.description: Upscale and enhance image clarity using Koukoutu async API
